title: Add nav links for key sections, second WhatsApp number, and full venue address

requirements.text: Add navigation links in both the desktop and mobile menus (SiteHeader.tsx) for the following sections: About Us, Our Banquet, Specialist, Decor, Event, Seminar & Conference. Each link must smooth-scroll to the corresponding section anchor on the page.

quotes: about us, our banquet, specialist,decor, event , seminar and conference make a link

acceptanceCriteria: The header nav (desktop and mobile) shows links: About Us, Our Banquet, Specialist, Decor, Event, Seminar & Conference
Clicking each link smooth-scrolls to the matching section anchor on the page
All six links are present in both the desktop nav bar and the mobile slide-out Sheet menu

requirements.text: Create or ensure the existence of the six page sections referenced by the new nav links: Our Banquet, Specialist, Decor, Event, Seminar & Conference (About Us already exists). Each missing section should be added as a distinct, styled section component and rendered in App.tsx in a logical order. Sections should have matching id anchors (e.g., id="banquet", id="specialist", id="decor", id="event", id="seminar-conference").

quotes: about us, our banquet, specialist,decor, event , seminar and conference make a link

acceptanceCriteria: Each of the six sections exists on the page with a matching id anchor
About Us section retains its existing id anchor (e.g., id="about")
All new sections are rendered in App.tsx in a sensible order
Each new section has at least a heading and brief placeholder content consistent with the venue's greenery theme

requirements.text: Add a second WhatsApp number (9794416439) to the BRAND constants (brand.ts) and display it alongside the existing WhatsApp number in the ContactBookingSection and SiteFooter. Label it clearly (e.g., 'WhatsApp 2' or a secondary contact label).
acceptanceCriteria: brand.ts exports a second WhatsApp number: 9794416439
Both WhatsApp numbers are displayed in ContactBookingSection
Both WhatsApp numbers are displayed in SiteFooter
Each WhatsApp number is a clickable wa.me link opening the respective chat

requirements.text: Update the venue address in brand.ts and all display locations (SiteFooter, ContactBookingSection) to: Avsar Vatika Marriage Hall, Dughara Chauraha, Rajwal Road, Khajani, Gorakhpur, UP – 273211.

quotes: Add address Avsar Vatika Marriage hall dughara chauraha rajwal road khajani Gorakhpur up pin 273211

acceptanceCriteria: The address in brand.ts is updated to: Avsar Vatika Marriage Hall, Dughara Chauraha, Rajwal Road, Khajani, Gorakhpur, UP – 273211
The updated address is displayed in SiteFooter
The updated address is displayed in ContactBookingSection
No old or placeholder address text remains visible

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
Do not change the backend schema or any Motoko files
Preserve all existing sections and their content; only add new ones
Maintain the existing greenery OKLCH color theme throughout new sections
nonGoals: Creating full content pages or sub-routes for each section (sections are single-page anchors only)
Adding a new backend endpoint or data model
Removing or redesigning any existing section
